claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements harness boundary audit for full-tool Claude agents with dry-run default, explicit authorization requirements, and git-backed file snapshot verification.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot function captures project file state using git ls-files and filesystem walks
evidence.why: Verified boundary snapshot implementation matches claimed line range

evidence.summary: Pre-execution boundary snapshot call establishes baseline for comparison
evidence.why: Verified timing of boundary audit before agent execution

evidence.summary: Post-execution boundary diff and violation detection logic
evidence.why: Verified boundary enforcement after agent execution

evidence.summary: BOUNDARY_PROJECT_MUTATION blockers added to readiness when violations detected
evidence.why: Verified boundary violations block PRD readiness

evidence.summary: execution_policy.default_mode is dry_run requiring explicit authorization
evidence.why: Verified default safety prevents accidental execution

evidence.summary: Execute mode requires both executeAgents and allowAgentDispatch flags
gitFiles function uses git ls-files for project state tracking
evidence.why: Verified git integration for boundary snapshots

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors validates scope declaration on all evidence records
evidence.why: Verified evidence scope enforcement prevents assumption promotion
Verified schema contract enforces evidence discipline

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues requires concrete paths for project-scoped evidence
evidence.why: Verified project facts require concrete file locators

evidence.summary: Test verifies boundary blocks project mutation even when agent results pass
evidence.why: Verified test coverage for boundary enforcement behavior

evidence.summary: Git-backed boundary tests detect untracked and gitignored mutations
evidence.why: Verified git integration tests cover all file change scenarios

evidence.summary: Evidence scope validation tests prevent external-only evidence for project facts
evidence.why: Verified scope validation tests enforce evidence discipline

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation configures Claude tool boundaries and permission mode
evidence.why: Verified provider adapter sets tool restrictions for evidence agents

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceAgentPrompt generates agent instructions with boundary rules
evidence.why: Verified agent prompt enforces write boundary and evidence structure

result.notes: Verification confirms all explorer and cross-checker evidence: no assumptions presented as facts, all evidence paths are accurate and usable, line ranges match actual code, missing is correctly empty, and cross-checker independently confirms all claims. Implementation is complete with git-backed snapshots, dry-run defaults, dual-flag authorization, scope validation, and comprehensive test coverage.
